title: MoleRate: comparing molecular relative evolutionary rates to detect convergent evolution
abstract: In comparative evolutionary genomics, faster or slower evolution of a particular gene, site, or branch in a phylogenetic tree, when compared to the appropriate average, has been interpreted as evidence of conservation, functional importance, or adaptation...

title: Dynamics of natural selection preceding human viral epidemics and pandemics
abstract: Using a phylogenetic framework to characterize natural selection, we investigate the hypothesis that zoonotic viruses require adaptation prior to zoonosis to sustain human-to-human transmission...
